The Guide

Lived-in knowledge.
Not guidebook knowledge.

I've spent years driving every prefecture in Japan — from the Nurburgring-inspired passes of Nikko to the pre-dawn emptiness of Ōsaka's bayfront expressways. This isn't a curated tour. It's access to the places, people, and moments that take years to discover.

Whether you want to attend a tucked-away kei car meet in the Kanagawa mountains or need someone to navigate the JDM import scene on your behalf, I make the complicated simple.

47
Prefectures driven
10+
Years in Japan
∞

Guide you'll actually need
What We Do

Pick your kind of Japan.

01

Mountain Pass Routes

The touge roads that inspired Initial D. Early morning, low traffic, your car — or one I can arrange.

02

Car Culture Immersion

Daikoku PA at 2am. Tsurugi meets. The side of Japan that takes years to find invitations into.

03

JDM Sourcing & Import

Auction access, dealer navigation, paperwork translation, and shipment coordination. I've done this. I'll do it for you.

04

Track Day Experiences

Fuji Speedway. Tsukuba. Motegi. I'll book your slot, sort your transport, and brief you on what to expect.

05

Countryside & Backroads

Two-lane prefectural roads through rice paddies and cedar forests. No tour buses. No crowds. Just the drive.

06

Bespoke Planning

Have something specific in mind? I build custom itineraries. One day or two weeks — tell me what you want.

The Experience

The roads speak for themselves.

Ask Me Anything

Have a question?
I've probably been there.

Not sure if Japan is the right trip, or whether I can help with what you have in mind? Ask below — powered by AI trained on everything I know about Japan's car scene.

こんにちは — I'm the Dokuritsu assistant. Ask me anything about Japan driving experiences, JDM sourcing, routes, or logistics. I'll give you a straight answer.
